meta.title: Marco Sèvegrand
meta.description: I build fast, reliable software products that solve real-world problems.

hero.name: Marco Sèvegrand
hero.tagline: I build fast, reliable software products that solve real-world problems.

about: I design and build **reliable software systems** with a strong focus on long-term architecture and infrastructure quality.
My main domains are <u>systems design</u>, <u>cybersecurity</u>, and <u>production architecture</u> with emphasis on resilience, observability, and scalability.
I work primarily with **C** and **Go** for backend and low-level components, and use <u>Kubernetes</u> to deploy, orchestrate, and operate services in cloud environments.

experience.title: Full-Stack Developer
points: Working as a **self-employed developer** on-site with the IDRYL Technologies team.
Designing and developing a **fitness tracker PWA** (SvelteKit + Postgres).

experience.title: Store Associate and Web Developer
points: Assisting **in-store operations** and providing daily customer support in a unique retail environment.
Acting as the **solo developer** for the company website, delivering and maintaining the web presence independently.
Managing and improving Biobrassica’s **social media presence** with consistent content and brand communication.

experience.title: Math & Physics Tutor
points: Providing **one-on-one tutoring** in mathematics and physics for high-school students.
Creating **tailored study approaches** to help students build confidence, stay consistent, and prepare for exams.

education.institution: Esc. Sec. Fernão de Magalhães, Chave, Portugal

projects.name: Space Mission Communication Protocols
projects.desc: Graded 20/20 in the Computer Networks course
highlights: Implemented a reliable UDP with **forward error correction** and **packet retransmission**.
